What: Scale paid acquisition with current creative + new variants
How (mechanic): Increase budget 25% on best-performing campaigns. New creative test: Naate hook + Tier-2 city dialect-targeting. Ad sets segmented by recency tier.

What: Bring back churned high-intent users with last-watched-show recall ads
How (mechanic): Dynamic creative — pull last 3 watched shows from CMS. Show "New episode of [show]" or "Continue watching [show]" creative. Lookalike from re-acquired users.

What: Daily personalised content nudge to drive paywall views
How (mechanic): Trigger on cohort + last-watched-genre. Send between 7-9 PM IST. Different creative per dialect. Click events feed downstream CLM filter.

What: Cohort-targeted WA message with new release / continuation hook
How (mechanic): Dialect-creative split: BHO/HAR/RAJ. Image + 2 CTAs (Watch Now + WhatsApp link). Send Sat/Sun morning.

Cohort: T1 + T2 (clicked PN/WA but didn't convert)
What: Premium creative for users showing intent
How (mechanic): Rich creative with video preview. Triggered 24-48h after PN/WA click without conversion. Test with 20% subset W2 then scale.

What: Voice-first re-engagement with Naate / new release hook
How (mechanic): Vendor delivers calls with branched script. WA link sent post-call. Watched_Naate flag drives opening line. Personalised dialect delivery.

Cohort: All paywall viewers who reject ₹1 trial
What: Pitch ₹20 movie pass instead of losing user
How (mechanic): User rejects trial → fallback overlay: "Don't want subscription? Buy this movie ₹20." Single-content unlock for 48h. Logs purchase for sub upsell remarketing.
Success metric: 5% of rejectors take TVOD · 10% of TVOD → sub later

What: Seed engagement with free content before pitching
How (mechanic): Curated lighter shows in "Free Zone". User watches X min / Y eps free. At climax cliffhanger → dual-CTA overlay. Don't interrupt mid-scene.
Success metric: 30% reach climax · 8% take TVOD/sub at climax pitch

How (mechanic): Test arm: shows "₹20 just this movie" + "₹199 unlimited" side-by-side. Control: standard ₹199 paywall. Rolled out at 50% in W2.

What: Show TVOD / Tiered / Trial / Standard sub options on revoke confirmation
How (mechanic): Backend fix in progress. Once live: revoke confirmation screen offers 4 paths to re-engage. Default highlight on TVOD.
Success metric: 12% of revokers click any option · 4% convert

What: Roll coin paywall from 15% to 50% rollout
How (mechanic): Already +1.5% lift at 15%. Scale to 50% in W2. Add coin earning mechanics for sharing/streak (encourages stickiness).
Success metric: Coin paywall converts 18% of viewers · 25% buy more coins
